exp_desc: HGRv3 R0 quick probe for weak inner distill and expert_top_k under hidden-only outer routing. anchor=A0 mode=distill_k2 k=2 dims=128/16/160/64 scale=4 bs=4096/8192
cmd: python3 hyperopt_tune.py --config-name config --max-evals 10 --tune-epochs 40 --tune-patience 8 --seed 1812 --run-group fmoe_hgr_v3 --run-axis hparam --run-phase R0HGRv3_router8_C02_A0_distill_k2 inner_router_use_feature=true ++search.inner_router_use_feature=\[true\] expert_use_feature=false ++search.expert_use_feature=\[false\] group_balance_lambda=0.001
